mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM PLACE p, RESTAURANT r WHERE p.place_id = r.restaurant_id
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM PLACE p, RESTAURANT r WHERE p.place_id = r.restaurant_id AND r.areacode = #{areacode}

SELECT T.place_id, T.place_type, T.name, T.address, T.view_count, T.image_url, T.placeRegDate FROM ( SELECT A.place_id, A.place_type, A.name, A.address, A.view_count, A.image_url, A.placeRegDate, ROWNUM AS rn FROM ( SELECT p.place_id, p.place_type, p.name, p.address, p.view_count, p.image_url, p.created_at AS placeRegDate FROM place p JOIN restaurant r ON p.place_id = r.restaurant_id ORDER BY p.place_id DESC ) A WHERE ROWNUM <= #{end} ) T WHERE T.rn >= #{start}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO PLACE ( PLACE_ID, PLACE_TYPE, NAME, ADDRESS, VIEW_COUNT, LATITUDE, LONGITUDE, IMAGE_URL, CREATED_AT
) VALUES ( #{place_id, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, 'REST', #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{address, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 0, #{latitude, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{longitude, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{image_url, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSTIMESTAMP )

INSERT INTO RESTAURANT ( restaurant_id, description, phone, category, status, areaCode, opentime, restdate, parking ) VALUES ( #{restaurant_id, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{description, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{phone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{category, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'OPEN', #{areaCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{opentime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{restdate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parking, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT place_id, place_type, name, address, view_count, latitude, longitude, image_url, created_at FROM PLACE WHERE place_id = #{place_id}
SELECT restaurant_id, description, TRIM(phone) AS phone, category, status, opentime, restdate, parking, TRIM(areacode) AS areaCode FROM RESTAURANT WHERE restaurant_id = #{place_id}
mapper.update: UPDATE PLACE SET name = #{name}, address = #{address}, latitude = #{latitude}, longitude = #{longitude}, image_url = #{image_url} WHERE place_id = #{place_id}

UPDATE RESTAURANT SET description = #{description}, phone = #{phone}, category = #{category}, opentime = #{opentime}, restdate = #{restdate}, parking = #{parking}, areacode = #{areaCode} WHERE restaurant_id = #{restaurant_id}
